description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image and define the variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS=30.0.3, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK=30, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS=4333796. Include a global before_script that runs apt-get update, installs wget tar unzip lib32stdc++6 lib32z1, downloads the Android SDK tools zip, unzips it, installs platforms;android-30, platform-tools, build-tools;30.0.3, sets ANDROID_HOME and updates PATH, makes ./gradlew executable, accepts all SDK licenses, and restores pipefail handling. Define stages test, build, checkIcons, and pages; in the test stage add a tests job that runs ./gradlew test, in the build stage add an assemble job that runs ./gradlew assembleChromaticDebug, ./gradlew assembleChromaticRelease, ./gradlew assembleMonochromaticDebug, ./gradlew assembleMonochromaticRelease and stores the app/build/outputs/ directory as an artifact, in the checkIcons stage add an icons job that installs imagemagick and runs bash check_icons.sh, and in the pages stage add a pages job that runs bash process5_website_xml.sh, moves the website folder to public, publishes the public directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
